name: OpenHands
description: Software engineering agent platform — runs in sandboxed Docker containers, edits code, runs tests, fixes bugs, and opens PRs. REST API and WebSocket for remote access.

skills.name: Code Agent
skills.description: Autonomously write, edit, run, and test code across entire codebases in an isolated Docker container.

skills.name: GitHub Integration
skills.description: Resolve GitHub issues end-to-end: branch, commit, push, and open pull requests automatically.

skills.name: Remote API Access
skills.description: Drive OpenHands agents programmatically via REST API and WebSocket for CI/CD and tooling integration.
